acceptance_criteria_results.description: .codex/skills/{name}/SKILL.md skills displayed in Codex tab via loadCodexSkills() with cliTools:['codex']
acceptance_criteria_results.evidence: loadCodexSkills() at line 312-353 of src/lib/slash-commands.ts sets source:'codex-skill' and cliTools:['codex'] on each parsed skill (lines 341-345). Test 'should load Codex skills with source codex-skill and cliTools codex' (line 744-766 of test file) verifies this.

acceptance_criteria_results.description: ~/.codex/skills/{name}/SKILL.md global skills use os.homedir() as default basePath
acceptance_criteria_results.evidence: loadCodexSkills() line 313: 'const root = basePath ?? os.homedir()' uses os.homedir() when no basePath provided. Test 'should use os.homedir() when basePath is not provided' (line 768-794) mocks os.homedir and verifies global skill loading.

acceptance_criteria_results.description: Codex skills are hidden in Claude tab via filterCommandsByCliTool() filtering
acceptance_criteria_results.evidence: filterCommandsByCliTool() in command-merger.ts (line 184-199) filters by cliTools array: when cliTools is ['codex'], cliToolId==='claude' returns false. Codex skills set cliTools:['codex'], so they are excluded from Claude tab. Claude skills leave cliTools undefined, which maps to claude-only (line 193-194).

acceptance_criteria_results.description: Non-existent directory returns empty array without error
acceptance_criteria_results.evidence: loadCodexSkills() lines 316-318 check fs.existsSync and return [] if directory does not exist. Test 'should return empty array when skills directory does not exist' (line 736-742) verifies this.

acceptance_criteria_results.description: Path traversal defense: directories containing '..' are skipped
acceptance_criteria_results.evidence: loadCodexSkills() line 331: 'if (entry.name.includes("..")) continue' rejects path traversal entries. Test 'should skip directories containing ".."' (line 796-816) verifies ..evil directory is rejected.

parseSkillFile() lines 142-146 check stat.size > MAX_SKILL_FILE_SIZE_BYTES (65536) and return null. Test 'should skip oversized SKILL.md files' (line 818-836) creates 70KB file and verifies it is skipped with warning logged.

loadCodexSkills() lines 324-326 check skills.length >= MAX_SKILLS_COUNT (100) and break. Test 'should enforce MAX_SKILLS_COUNT limit' (line 838-861) creates 102 skills and verifies only <=100 are loaded.

getSlashCommandGroups() line 398 calls loadCodexSkills(basePath) and line 399 merges codexLocalSkills with other skills. Test 'should include local Codex skills when basePath is provided' (line 895-934) verifies codex-skill appears with correct source and cliTools.

acceptance_criteria_results.description: Worktree API route includes sources.codexSkill count
acceptance_criteria_results.evidence: route.ts line 43 declares codexSkill:number in SlashCommandsResponse.sources. Line 105 loads global Codex skills via loadCodexSkills(). Line 122 counts codex-skill sources. Line 131 returns filteredCodexSkillCount in response.
src/types/slash-commands.ts line 31: "export type SlashCommandSource = 'standard' | 'mcbd' | 'worktree' | 'skill' | 'codex-skill';" includes 'codex-skill' as a valid source type.

acceptance_criteria_results.description: D009 comment accurately documents cliTools behavior for .claude/skills vs .codex/skills
acceptance_criteria_results.evidence: parseSkillFile() JSDoc (lines 130-133) contains D009 comment: '.claude/skills/ skills do not set cliTools (left as undefined), which means filterCommandsByCliTool() treats them as claude-only. Codex skills (.codex/skills/) set cliTools: ["codex"] explicitly in loadCodexSkills(). See filterCommandsByCliTool() in command-merger.ts for the authoritative behavior.'

acceptance_criteria_results.description: cliTools field JSDoc accurately documents behavior including codex-only option
acceptance_criteria_results.evidence: src/types/slash-commands.ts lines 51-60: cliTools JSDoc lists all valid combinations including ['codex'] for Codex CLI only (line 55), and notes undefined means claude-only with reference to filterCommandsByCliTool().

summary: All 12 acceptance criteria passed. Unit tests (4984 passed, 7 skipped across 251 test files), TypeScript type check, and ESLint all pass cleanly. The implementation correctly adds Codex custom skill loading from .codex/skills/ with proper security measures (path traversal defense, file size limits, skill count limits), correct cliTools filtering, and accurate documentation.
